title: Paint Bucket 3D
description: In this resource set, the usual paints have been replaced with 3D buckets of paints. Works with other resource sets!
body:
# Paint Bucket 3D Resource Pack
![All paint bucket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07eaf04c64e5f25d936c476bbe6dd5367891481a.png)
# ![English](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a67aca54d7e243e1f9ad0bde51c03c65fe406c66.png)
Thanks to this resource pack, all dyes replace their usual texture with buckets of paints 

If any crashes/errors occur during use, then be sure to let us know! I would appreciate it.

Before using, you must install the following settings to choose from:
- Optifine
- CITResewn
# ![Русский](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2571a1d94201b723e686d6772b68932498ce5d8f.png)
Благодаря этому ресурспаку все красители заменяют свою обычную текстуру на ведра с красками

Если во время использования возникнут какие-либо сбои/ошибки, то обязательно сообщите! Буду признателен.

Перед использованием вы должны установить на выбор следующие установки:
- Optifine 
- CITResewn

#
[![Optidine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f0e66ffeb711786ad3766b2ea35021f48ae6410.png)](https://optifine.net/downloads)
[![Citresewn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d5d371a672579dcdd28945698a49eafaa8ece01.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
[![2d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71b798093a9cb432416a25af7574c84422e26f50.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/paint-bucket-2d)
